raw_text:
2026-04-01
- Took the bicycle in for a tune-up
- The cat refused dinner again
- Found my keys behind the couch

2026-04-02
- Picked up groceries from the corner market
- Long phone call with mom
- Started reading a new novel

2026-04-03
- The bicycle chain snapped on the way home
- Stopped at the bakery for bread
- Couldn't sleep, watched two movies

2026-04-05
- Yoga class in the morning
- Lunch with Sarah at the new ramen place
- The cat finally ate the new food

2026-04-06
- Replaced the bicycle chain at the shop
- Long walk through the park
- Tried a new recipe for dinner

2026-04-08
- Doctor appointment for the annual checkup
- The train was delayed by an hour
- Watched a documentary about bees

2026-04-09
- Started a new book about ancient Rome
- The cat ran out the door but came back
- Made pasta from scratch

2026-04-10
- Worked from a cafe all morning
- Bought a new lamp for the office
- Phone call with grandma

2026-04-11
- Russian language lesson over Zoom
- Поход в магазин за продуктами
- Watched the sunset from the rooftop

2026-04-12
- Hiked to the waterfall with friends
- The cat threw up on the rug
- Pizza night at home

2026-04-13
- Прочитал интересную статью про космос
- Long jog around the lake
- Tried oat milk for the first time

2026-04-15
- Sent the proposal to the client
- The cat napped on the keyboard all afternoon
- Cooked stir-fry for dinner
